tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe zdania (1.1.–1.10.), wybierając właściwy wariant odpowiedzi. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.stem: By the time we arrived, the film _______.
Look at those clouds! It _______ rain soon.
If I _______ you, I would accept the offer.
He _______ his homework when the lights went out.
I wish I _______ speak French fluently.
The bridge _______ in 1894 and is still in use today.
She _______ to the gym three times a week.
They _______ for two hours before the taxi finally came.
This time tomorrow, I _______ on the beach.
